intro.speaker: Elara
intro.text: My head throbs as I open my eyes...

intro.speaker: Elara
intro.text: Where... where am I? This looks like someone's bedroom.

intro.speaker: Elara
intro.text: The last thing I remember was the vampires cornering me...

intro.speaker: Elara
intro.text: How did I escape? And who brought me here?
A faint scent of roses lingers in the air.

intro.speaker: Elara
intro.text: I should look around for clues.

dialogues.speaker: Elara
dialogues.text: I open the worn leather diary.
"Day 47: I saw her again today. The raven-haired beauty with sad eyes."
"She doesn't know I watch her from the shadows. I must protect her."

dialogues.speaker: Elara
dialogues.text: My hands tremble. Someone has been watching me...
Inside hangs Victorian-style dresses, all in shades of black and deep crimson.

dialogues.speaker: Elara
dialogues.text: A faint scent of roses and... blood?

dialogues.speaker: Elara
dialogues.text: These clothes don't belong to any human.

dialogues.speaker: Elara
dialogues.text: I approach the heavy oak door.

dialogues.speaker: Elara
dialogues.text: It's locked from the outside. I'm trapped.
A note slides under the door.
'Stay here. You're safe. I'll return at dusk.'
